recommendations.title: Bang Bang!
recommendations.overview: A young bank receptionist gets mixed up with Rajveer Nanda, a man who has a mysterious background.

recommendations.title: War
recommendations.overview: Khalid, entrusted with the task of eliminating former soldier turned rogue Kabir, engages in an epic battle with his mentor who taught him everything.

recommendations.title: Fighter
recommendations.overview: As India faces a militant attack in Kashmir, the country’s best combat aviators join forces under a reckless yet brilliant squadron leader to form 'Air Dragons', faces mortal dangers and their inner demons.

recommendations.title: The Martian

recommendations.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
recommendations.overview: With the price on his head ever increasing, John Wick uncovers a path to defeating The High Table. But before he can earn his freedom, Wick must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances across the globe and forces that turn old friends in

recommendations.title: Conquest 1453
recommendations.overview: After the death of his father Murat II, young Mehmet II ascends to the Ottoman throne. After braving internal and external enemies, he decides to complete what he was destined to do: Conquer Constantinople.

recommendations.title: My Name Is Vendetta
recommendations.overview: After old enemies kill his family, a former mafia enforcer and his feisty daughter flee to Milan, where they hide out while plotting their revenge.

recommendations.title: The Six Wives of Henry Lefay
recommendations.overview: A presumed-dead man's current wife and former wives squabble over his funeral arrangements.

recommendations.title: The Rain Children
recommendations.overview: There is a world with two towns that are big enemies: Pyross and Hydross.
